IERC20","name":"","type":"address"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"}],"devdoc":{"details":"Supersedes the v1 closed escrow (which named the provider at createJob). Lifecycle:         createJob -> fund -> acceptJob -> submitWork -> complete | reject | claimRefund.         Funds safety uses checks-effects-interactions: status is updated before any token         transfer, so a failed/reentrant transfer reverts the whole call. `acceptJob` is our         own primitive \u2014 NOT a Cobo Agentic Wallet method.","kind":"dev","methods":{"claimRefund(uint256)":{"details":"Allowed from Funded (nobody accepted), Accepted (provider never submitted), or         Submitted (evaluator never decided)."},"createJob(address,uint256,bytes32,uint64)":{"details":"Does NOT move funds \u2014 call {fund} after approving USDC to this contract."},"fund(uint256)":{"details":"Funding BEFORE acceptance means the board shows genuinely-funded open jobs that         providers can trust before committing work."},"submitWork(uint256,bytes32,string)":{"params":{"deliverableHash":"keccak256 of the deliverable content (integrity commitment).","irysId":"Irys data-item id; fetch at the gateway and verify keccak256 == deliverableHash."}}},"title":"AgentWorksEscrowV2","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"acceptJob(uint256)":{"notice":"Any agent claims a funded, unclaimed job. First claimer wins; a second acceptJob         reverts (the job is no longer Funded). The claimer becomes the provider."},"claimRefund(uint256)":{"notice":"Client reclaims escrowed funds after the deadline if the job was never settled."},"complete(uint256)":{"notice":"Evaluator accepts the deliverable; pays the provider."},"createJob(address,uint256,bytes32,uint64)":{"notice":"Client posts an OPEN job (no provider named) \u2014 price, evaluator, spec hash, deadline."},"fund(uint256)":{"notice":"Client escrows the job amount in USDC (requires prior ERC-20 approval)."},"getJob(uint256)":{"notice":"Returns the full job record; reverts if the job does not exist."},"nextJobId()":{"notice":"Monotonic job id counter (first job is id 1)."},"reject(uint256)":{"notice":"Evaluator rejects the deliverable; refunds the client."},"submitWork(uint256,bytes32,string)":{"notice":"Provider submits the deliverable's content hash + the Irys id where it's stored."},"token()":{"notice":"The settlement token (USDC, or MockUSDC for tests). Immutable."}},"notice":"Open-marketplace settlement layer between distrustful agents. A Client posts and funds         a job WITHOUT naming a provider; ANY agent may then claim the funded job via         {acceptJob} (first claimer wins \u2014 the on-chain race is the source of truth). The         claimer submits a deliverable content-hash; the Evaluator accepts (pay Provider) or         rejects (refund Client). An unresolved funded job is reclaimable by the Client after         the deadline \u2014 including jobs nobody ever accepted.","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"src/AgentWorksEscrowV2.sol":"AgentWorksEscrowV2"},"evmVersion":"prague","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/"]},"sources":{"src/AgentWorksEscrowV2.sol":{"keccak256":"0xc2992bef9c05711730e2d10daadde4f244223bd99b5b071167ee297257ff1b05","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://b15c961a001ad37089119b2079ad042943cd4d39352658e039e2a178def271d5","dweb:/ipfs/QmSayymAp6V5vuaCFsGJvQEdY8rcGkbcaX2tFYxajhjTkf"]}},"version":1}

claimRefund(uint256).details: Allowed from Funded (nobody accepted), Accepted (provider never submitted), or         Submitted (evaluator never decided).

createJob(address,uint256,bytes32,uint64.details: Does NOT move funds — call {fund} after approving USDC to this contract.

fund(uint256).details: Funding BEFORE acceptance means the board shows genuinely-funded open jobs that         providers can trust before committing work.

params.deliverableHash: keccak256 of the deliverable content (integrity commitment).
params.irysId: Irys data-item id; fetch at the gateway and verify keccak256 == deliverableHash.

acceptJob(uint256).notice: Any agent claims a funded, unclaimed job. First claimer wins; a second acceptJob         reverts (the job is no longer Funded). The claimer becomes the provider.

claimRefund(uint256).notice: Client reclaims escrowed funds after the deadline if the job was never settled.

complete(uint256).notice: Evaluator accepts the deliverable; pays the provider.

createJob(address,uint256,bytes32,uint64.notice: Client posts an OPEN job (no provider named) — price, evaluator, spec hash, deadline.

fund(uint256).notice: Client escrows the job amount in USDC (requires prior ERC-20 approval).

getJob(uint256).notice: Returns the full job record; reverts if the job does not exist.

nextJobId().notice: Monotonic job id counter (first job is id 1).

reject(uint256).notice: Evaluator rejects the deliverable; refunds the client.

submitWork(uint256,bytes32,string).notice: Provider submits the deliverable's content hash + the Irys id where it's stored.

token().notice: The settlement token (USDC, or MockUSDC for tests). Immutable.
